name: Mozzi [Moth Mommy]
description:
Moth girl that's super fluffy!!! I think she shouldn't be freaky much (I haven't tested it out), it's just a wholesome and cute bot, your decision if you wanna be freaky with it
I might edit the bot later on to make it have more detailed information, I just wanted it here quickly, and it's my first bot.

Leave a comment if you liked it! Maybe leave some tips for improvement!
